prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for furan were computed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier `standard`) with the PySCF program. The calculation was performed in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The input geometry was provided from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz`. The calculation converged successfully. The sum of fukui_plus indices was 1.0000, and the sum of fukui_minus indices was 1.0000, indicating proper charge conservation for the N±1 states.

The most electrophilic site was identified as Carbon (atom 5) with an f_plus value of 1.9242931.
The most nucleophilic site was also identified as Carbon (atom 5) with an f_minus value of 0.1616371.
